title: The Making of a Logo
summary: A new website, and a 3D printed logo!

title: Dear Zach
summary: I suppose it's time I responded...

title: 🌟 When everything's important, nothing is! 🌟
summary: Do libraries and frameworks prioritize components on boot? If so, how, and if not what can we do? And, in exploring that question, I discovered that Server-Side Rendering isn't a silver bullet!

title: Slicing SVG 9 Ways
summary: I recently made a 3D Card Flip element as part of my Supercharged YouTube video series, and I ran into some challenges with the shadows. I decided I should explain how I approached the solution.

title: The Anatomy of a Frame
summary: I'm often asked by other developers about parts of the pixel workflow, and what fires when and why, so I figured it might be worth putting up a little reference for what's involved in shipping pixels to screen.

title: The Hack is Back!
summary: Image decoding can be a source of checkboarding and jank. What if there was a way to work around it without resorting to a cluster of horror hacks? Step right up and meet my new friend createImageBitmap!
